kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://reqres.in/api/users?page=2 path_url=/api/users?page=2 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None

kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.
